all.en: Dear valued tenants of Lakeside Corporate Tower, we hope this notice finds you well.
all.zh: Lakeside Corporate Tower 的尊貴租戶您好，希望這份通知送達時您一切安好。

all.en: The property management office is writing to inform all occupants of major upcoming maintenance work scheduled to take place over the next three weeks.
all.zh: 物業管理辦公室在此通知所有住戶，未來三週將進行重大的維護工程。

all.en: After a recent annual inspection conducted by certified technicians, two essential building systems were identified as requiring immediate upgrades.
all.zh: 在最近一次由認證技師執行的年度檢查之後，本大樓有兩項重要系統被判定需要立即升級。

all.en: Specifically, our four passenger elevators and the central HVAC system will undergo a comprehensive modernization to improve safety, efficiency, and overall comfort.
all.zh: 具體而言，本棟的四部載客電梯與中央空調系統將進行全面性的現代化更新，以提升安全、效能與整體舒適度。

all.en: The elevator project will begin on Monday, June 1, and is expected to conclude by Friday, June 12.
all.zh: 電梯工程將於 6 月 1 日（週一）開始，預計於 6 月 12 日（週五）完工。

all.en: During this maintenance window, only two of the four elevators will be available at any given time between business hours of 9:00 a.m. and 6:00 p.m.
all.zh: 在此維護期間，營業時間上午 9 點至下午 6 點之間，四部電梯中僅有兩部可同時使用。

all.en: Tenants should anticipate longer than usual wait times and are kindly encouraged to use the stairwells whenever practical.
all.zh: 租戶應預期等候時間將較平常為長，建議在情況允許時多加利用樓梯間。

all.en: The HVAC upgrade is scheduled for the following two weekends, specifically June 13 to 14 and June 20 to 21.
all.zh: 空調系統升級則安排在接下來的兩個週末進行，分別是 6 月 13 至 14 日及 6 月 20 至 21 日。

all.en: Because heating and cooling will be completely unavailable on those Saturdays and Sundays, the contractor will deliver portable fans to each floor lobby in advance.
all.zh: 由於上述週六與週日將完全無法供應暖氣與冷氣，承包商將於施工前將攜帶式風扇配送至各樓層大廳。

all.en: All scheduled outages have been intentionally arranged outside of standard weekday business hours to minimize temporary inconvenience to office operations.
all.zh: 所有預定停機皆刻意安排在一般平日營業時間之外，以將辦公作業的暫時不便降至最低。

all.en: The work will be performed by Meridian Building Services, a fully licensed and insured contractor with more than twenty years of industry experience.
all.zh: 本次工程將由 Meridian Building Services 執行，該公司為持有完整執照與保險的承包商，擁有逾二十年的業界經驗。

all.en: For your safety, please do not enter any area marked with yellow caution tape or signage reading 「Authorized Personnel Only」.
all.zh: 為了您的安全，請勿進入任何貼有黃色警示膠帶或標示「Authorized Personnel Only」的區域。

all.en: Children and pets visiting the building must remain under direct supervision at all times during the construction period.
all.zh: 施工期間，造訪本大樓的孩童與寵物必須全程處於直接監護之下。

all.en: Tenants who require accessibility accommodations, such as priority elevator access, are asked to contact our office by Friday, May 29.
all.zh: 如有無障礙需求（例如優先使用電梯）的租戶，請於 5 月 29 日（週五）前與本辦公室聯繫。

all.en: Deliveries of large or heavy items should be rescheduled, if possible, to avoid the two-week elevator maintenance period.
all.zh: 大型或重物的配送若有可能，建議改期以避開為期兩週的電梯維護期間。

all.en: After-hours access to the freight elevator can be arranged by submitting a written request at least forty-eight hours in advance.
all.zh: 若需於非營業時段使用貨梯，請至少於四十八小時前提出書面申請以便安排。

all.en: Please note that fire alarms may be briefly tested following the HVAC work, and tenants will receive a separate email confirming the exact test time.
all.zh: 請注意，空調工程結束後可能會短暫測試火警警報，本辦公室將另以電子郵件告知確切測試時間。

all.en: We sincerely apologize for any disruption these necessary improvements may cause to your daily routines.
all.zh: 對於本次必要改善工程可能對您日常作業造成的干擾，我們致上誠摯的歉意。

all.en: Once completed, the upgraded systems are expected to reduce energy consumption by approximately fifteen percent and significantly shorten elevator wait times.
all.zh: 工程完成後，升級後的系統預計可降低約百分之十五的能源消耗，並大幅縮短電梯等候時間。

all.en: A follow-up bulletin summarizing the project results will be distributed to every suite during the first week of July.
all.zh: 彙整本次工程成果的後續公告，將於 7 月第一週送達各承租單位。

all.en: If you have any questions, concerns, or special requests, please feel free to contact the property manager, Ms. Helena Choi, at extension 2200.
all.zh: 如有任何疑問、顧慮或特別需求，歡迎與物業經理 Helena Choi 小姐聯繫，分機 2200。

all.en: You may also email the management office at services@lakesidetower.com or visit the front desk on the ground floor during regular weekday hours.
all.zh: 您也可以寄送電子郵件至 services@lakesidetower.com，或於平日一般辦公時間至一樓櫃台洽詢。

all.en: Thank you in advance for your patience, cooperation, and continued partnership as we work to keep Lakeside Corporate Tower a safe and comfortable place to do business.
all.zh: 在我們持續努力讓 Lakeside Corporate Tower 成為安全且舒適的營運場所之際，謹此先行感謝您的耐心、配合與長期合作。
